'''鈭歠-k-dh-zh''' ('''kafakdhezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wallop|wallop]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wallop|wallop]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-k-dh-zh
|-
! Lemma
| kafakdhezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifakdhezhoko|thifakdhezhoko]] || [[word:jifakdhezhoko|jifakdhezhoko]] || [[word:shifakdhezhoko|shifakdhezhoko]] || [[word:kifakdhezhoko|kifakdhezhoko]]
